name: red_potion
description: A potion made from grinded Red Herbs that restores about 45 HP.

name: orange_potion
description: A potion made from grinded Red and Yellow Herbs that restores about 105 HP.

name: yellow_potion
description: A potion made from grinded Yellow Herbs that restores about 175 HP.

name: white_potion
description: A potion made from grinded White Herbs that restores about 325 HP.

name: blue_potion
description: A potion made from grinded Blue Herbs that restores about 60 SP.

name: green_potion
description: A potion which cures Poison, Silence, Blind and Chaos effects.
effects: Cures the user of [Blind], [Confusion], [Poison] and [Silence] statuses.

name: condensed_red_potion
description: A condensed red potion.

name: condensed_yellow_potion
description: A condensed yellow potion.

name: condensed_white_potion
description: A condensed white potion that weighs significantly less.

name: cheese
description: A palatable food with a unique scent that restores a small amount of SP.

name: yam
description: A kind of plant root used as food that restores a great amount of HP. It's advised to eat this slowly with water, or to bake it beforehand.

name: novice_potion
description: An exclusive red potion for Novices!

name: prickly_fruit
description: A freshly scented, thorny fruit from a tree that restores a small amount of HP and SP.

name: red_prickly_fruit
description: A freshly scented, thorny fruit from a tree that restores a small amount of HP and SP.

name: empty_potion_bottle
description: An empty bottle that can be used to contain potions.

name: beast_claw_1
description: A katar made of a huge beast. Striked enemy can not recover from the made damage.
effects: Adds a 10% chance of using [Fatal Wound] Lv 1 on the target when performing a physical attack.
If upgrade level is +9 or higher, Lv 2 [Fatal Wound] will be cast instead.

name: release_of_wish
description: A staff made of Crystal. It shines beautifully against the light. This staff can also help the holder recover from damage.
effects: Increases the recovery power of the user's healing skills 5%.
Adds a 10% chance for when dealing magic damage, the user will have 100 HP and 50 SP restored every 2 seconds for 10 seconds.

name: life_link_1
description: A holy armor made by the Goddess in order to cure the chosen warrior.  Increases the speed of natural recovery of the wearer.

name: moon_rabbit_hat_1
description: This headgear is a reward for helping the Moon Rabbits recover their runaway rice cake during the Hangawi Moon Festival.
effects: MAtk +5%

name: piggie_bank
description: A good place to store spare change. You never know when you might need zeny here or there for a potion.
effects: Enables the use of [Overcharge] Lv 2.

name: how_to_make_high_quality_potion
display_name: How To Make High Quality Potion
description: This is the manual book for producing Enriched White PotionZ, vitata500, Enriched cell juice.Enriched White PotionZ : Empty Test Tube 10 + white potion 20 + white herb 10 + Alcohol 1Vitata 500 : Empty Test Tube 10 + grape 10 + honey 10 + Blue Herb 10Concentrated Juice : Empty Test Tube 10 + Awakening Potion 5 + Intensive Potion 5 + Hot Sauce 5Cure Landscape : Empty Test Tube 10 + elixir 5 + Green Herbs 20 + Mastela Fruit 1 + Yggdrasil Leaf 1

name: eye_drops
description: A potion good for dried eyes. 5ml size.

name: recovery_stone_slot_1
description: A stone which increases recovery amount. Gives below stats to Costume slot 1.
effects: If upgrade level is +9 or higher,

name: recovery_skill_stone_slot_1
description: A stone which makes to use recovery skills well.
effects: Increases the recovery rate of recovery skills by 3%.

name: recovery_stone_slot_2
description: A stone which makes good recovery power. Gives below stats on Costume slot 2
effects: If upgrade level is +9 or higher,

name: condensed_potion_creation_guide
description: A book with instructions for creating Condensed Potions.

name: potion_creation_gude
description: A book that describes how to create potions.

name: muscovite
description: A silicate mineral which has a pearly luster. Symbolizes recovery of motivation.

name: elemental_potion_creation_guide
description: A book with the tagline, "Even Porings can make Elemental Potions with this book!" on the cover. The methods for creating Elemental Potions are detailed inside this book.Author: Pisrik Quve.

name: novice_poring_egg
description: A novie poring is sleeping inside. Use  to wake this monster. Extra 50% HP recovery rate when pet parameter is in or more than [Friendly].

name: portable_cage_for_scatleton
description:
A cage in which a cute Scatleton pet rests. It can be lured out using a [Pet Incubator].Diet: [Fresh Fish]Summoned Bonus
Increases the recovery rate of [Fresh Fish] consumables by 100%.
effects: While Summoned  Increases the recovery rate of Fresh Fish consumables by 1031%.

name: skelion_egg
description:
An egg in which a cute Skelion pet rests. This can be hatched using a [Pet Incubator].Diet: [Yummy Meat]Summoned Bonus
Increases the recovery rate of [Fresh Fish] consumables by 100%.
effects: While Summoned Increases the recovery rate of [Fresh Fish] consumables by 100%.

name: light_blue_potion
description: A potion made from grinded Blue Herbs that restores about 60 SP.

name: wo_e_white_potion
description: A White Potion which weighs less than normal.

name: wo_e_blue_potion
description: A Blue Potion which weighs less than normal.

name: throat_lozenge
description: A fresh candy for sore throats. A very small amount of HP recovery.

name: asai_fruit
description: A famous berry used in Brasilis deserts. It is made into ice-cream or juice during the hot summer months. Recover small amount HP.

name: purification_potion
description: A potion that has a special effect.

name: fresh_octopus_leg
description: Fresh Octopus leg. So fresh it is wiggling itself. Very tasty when just eating raw. Minor recovery of HP, SP.Item will vanish after the event period.

name: wo_e_white_potion
description: The youngest leaves of the white organic herb are used to make this potion.

name: wo_e_blue_potion
description: The freshest blue organic herbs are used to make this potion.

name: pumpkin_cake
description: A cake made with smashed moist pumpkin. Recovers 5% of HP and SP.

name: te_white_potion
description: Only available to use in the WoE TE zone. A health potion that is made up of ground white herbs.

combo: Extra option available in WoE TE area

name: te_white_slim_potion
description: Only available to use in the WoE TE zone. Provides the same effects as TE White Potion, but this potion is lighter in weight.

combo: Extra option available in WoE TE area

name: jolly_blue_potion
description: A potion made from ground Blue Herbs that restores about 60 SP.

name: jolly_condensed_white_potion
description: A condensed White Potion that weighs less.

name: jolly_chocolate_drink
description: A kind of drink made from chocolate and milk from one of the Royal Court Dessert Specialist's recipes. Although the Dessert Chef wishes for people to drink this treat elegantly, it's usually gulped down, enjoyed with hands sloppily placed on the waist.Restores 330 ~ 410 HPRestores 45 ~ 65 SP

name: trans_candy_red
description: Recover 45 HP.
effects: Transforms into Bloody Murderer for 10 minutes.
MHP + 1000 while shapeshifting.

name: trans_candy_blue
description: Recover 45 HP.
effects: Transforms into Bathory for 10 minutes.
MSP + 100 while shapeshifting.

name: trans_candy_yellow
description: Recover 45 HP.
effects: Transforms into Jack for 10 minutes.
Recovery effect increase for 2000% when consuming "Pumpkin" while shapeshifting.

name: trans_candy_green
description: Recover 45 HP.
effects: Transforms into Quve for 10 minutes.
HIT + 10, FLEE + 20 while shapeshifting.

name: delicious_anchovy
description: A saltwater fish of the family Engraulidae. This small fish has a dark blue back and a silvery white belly, and the catches off the coast of Lasagna are considered to be the best. It recovers a small amount of HP.
effects: Restores 30 to 46 HP.

name: speed_potion
description: A potion which increases the moving speed of a character for a duration.
effects: Greatly increases the user's movement speed for 5 seconds.

name: slow_potion
description: A potion which decreases the moving speed of a character for a duration.
effects: Greatly decreases the user's movement speed for 5 seconds.

name: first_aid_kit
description: A first aid kit that should contain potions, although they're known to hold other thingsâ€¦
effects: Gives a random potion type item.

name: fireproof_potion
description: A potion that will temporarily increase the user's resistance to the Fire property at the cost of increasing damage from the Water property for the potion's active duration.

combo: Reduces damage received from [Fire] element attacks by 20%.Increases damage received from [Water] element attacks by 15%.

name: coldproof_potion
description: A potion that will temporarily increase the user's resistance to the Water property at the cost of increasing damage from the Wind property for the potion's active duration.

combo: Reduces damage received from [Water] element attacks by 20%.Increases damage received from [Wind] element attacks by 15%.

name: earthproof_potion
description: A potion that will temporarily increase the user's resistance to the Earth property at the cost of increasing damage from the Fire property for the potion's active duration.

combo: Reduces damage received from [Earth] element attacks by 20%.Increases damage received from [Fire] element attacks by 15%.

name: thunderproof_potion
description: A potion that will temporarily increase the user's resistance to the Wind property at the cost of increasing damage from the Earth property for the potion's active duration.

combo: Reduces damage received from [Wind] element attacks by 20%.Increases damage received from [Earth] element attacks by 15%.

name: mercenary_red_potion
description: An HP Potion provided by the Mercenary Guild that can only be used for Mercenaries; it cannot restore HP for players.
effects: Restores the hired mercenary's HP by 1000, increased by their stats.

name: mercenary_blue_potion
description: An SP Potion provided by the Mercenary Guild that can only be used for Mercenaries; it cannot restore SP for players.
effects: Restores the hired mercenary's SP by 100, increased by their stats.

name: event_cake
description: A Christmas cake that is only available during the Christmas season. Automatically casts Lv.3 Magnificat and restores a small amount of HP.

name: mercenary_concentration_potion
description: A Concentration Potion for Mercenaries that slightly increases Attack Speed.
effects: Increases the hired mercenary's Aspd by 10% for the rest of the contract.

name: mercenary_awakening_potion
description: n Awakening Potion for Mercenaries that increases Attack Speed.
effects: Increases the hired mercenary's Aspd by 15% for the rest of the contract.

name: mercenary_berserk_potion
description: A Berserk Potion for Mercenaries that greatly increases Attack Speed.
effects: Increases the hired mercenary's Aspd by 20% for the rest of the contract.

name: cornus_tears
description: Potion made out of Cornus' Tears. You never know how they obtain the tear drops.
effects: Increases magic damage against the Tendrilrion, Cornus, Naga, Luciola Vespa and Pinguicula monsters by 10% for 10 minutes.

name: repair_a
description: Restores a certain amount of HP to Magic Gear

name: repair_b
description: Restores a proper amount of HP to Magic Gear

name: repair_c
description: Restores HP to Magic Gear

name: full_swing_k
description: A potion that increases Atk a little. Duration : 500 sec

name: mana
description: A potion that increases Matk a little. Duration : 500 sec.

name: hp_increase_potion_small
description: A small potion that increases MaxHP.
effects: Max HP increased by 500 + (10/3)*[Base Level] for 500 seconds.
Restores 1% of the user's max HP

name: hp_increase_potion_mid
description: A potion that increases MaxHP.
effects: Max HP increased by 1500 + (10/3)*[Base Level] for 500 seconds.
Restores 2% of the user's max HP

name: hp_increase_potion_large
description: A big potion that increases MaxHP.
effects: Max HP increased by 2500 + (10/3)*[Base Level] for 500 seconds.
Restores 5% of the user's max HP

name: sp_increase_potion_small
description: A small potion that increases MaxSP.
effects: Max SP increased by ([Base Level/10] - 5)% for 500 seconds.
Restores 2% of the user's max SP.

name: sp_increase_potion_mid
description: A potion that increases MaxSP.
effects: Max SP increased by [Base Level/10]% for 500 seconds.
Restores 4% of the user's max SP.

name: sp_increase_potion_large
description: A big potion that increases MaxSP.
effects: Max SP increased by ([Base Level/10] + 5)% for 500 seconds.
Restores 8% of the user's max SP.

name: enriched_white_potion_z
description: Recovers a large amount of HP.
effects: HP Recovery Rate +20% for 500 seconds.
Restores fixed 1,000 HP, unaffected by [Fatal Wound], [Increase HP Recovery], or Vit.

name: vitata500
description: Recovers SP, natural SP natural speed increased by 20% and MaxSP increased by 5%. Duration : 500 sec.
effects: SP Recovery Rate +20% for 500 seconds.
Max SP increased by 5% for 500 seconds.
Restores fixed 200 SP, unaffected by [Increase SP Recovery] or Int.

name: cure_free
description: Recovers several kinds of abnormal statuses. Recovers small amount of HP.
effects: Cures the user of [Silence], [Bleeding], [Poison], [Curse], [Reverse Orcish], and [Change Undead] statuses.
Restores fixed 500 HP, unaffected by [Fatal Wound], [Increase HP Recovery], or Vit.

name: gift_chocolate_basket
description: Beautifully wrapped gift basket filled with goodies to share. Bring these to the Lucky Dogg at Eden Group and exchange it for 75 Prize Medals. Lucky Dogg will stay to take your baskets until April 17th.  Opening it will give you the following: -5x Lovely Choco-Tart - restores an average amount of HP -3x Cute Strawberry-Choco -restores an average amount of SP -4x Chocolate Drink -Restores a high amount of HP and a low amount of SP -10x Hand-made Chocolate -restores 50hp/50sp -10x Handmade White Chocolate -restores 50hp/50sp

name: oblivion_curse
description: An ash powder that causes the Oblivion state. Oblivion lasts for 300 seconds. If under Oblivion state, SP doesn't recover naturally and cannot be canceled by Lex Divine or Green Potion. You cannot use skills while caught by Oblivion ashes.

name: death_hurt
description: A poison that pollutes a wound. When a target is caught by this poison for 300 seconds, recovery skills decrease in effect by 20%. The poison is extra potent if also inflicted by fatal wound.

name: te_potion_box
description: Contains 10 TE White Slim Potion.

name: elf_tear_stun
description: The first-class pharmacist Vincent has created this potion. Endows superhuman strength, though it's only temporary.
effects: Instantly consumes 3,000 of your HP and in return, immunizes you against Stun for 10 seconds.

name: elf_tear_stone_curse
description: The first-class pharmacist Vincent has created this potion. Endows superhuman strength, though it's only temporary.
effects: Instantly consumes 3,000 of your HP and in return, immunizes you against Petrification for 10 seconds.

name: elf_tear_freezing
description: The first-class pharmacist Vincent has created this potion. Endows superhuman strength, though it's only temporary.
effects: Instantly consumes 3,000 of your HP and in return, immunizes you against Frost for 10 seconds.

name: elf_tear_sleep
description: The first-class pharmacist Vincent has created this potion. Endows superhuman strength, though it's only temporary.
effects: Instantly consumes 3,000 of your HP and in return, immunizes you against Sleep for 10 seconds.

name: elf_tear_curse
description: The first-class pharmacist Vincent has created this potion. Endows superhuman strength, though it's only temporary.
effects: Instantly consumes 3,000 of your HP and in return, immunizes you against Curse for 10 seconds.

name: elf_tear_silence
description: The first-class pharmacist Vincent has created this potion. Endows superhuman strength, though it's only temporary.
effects: Instantly consumes 3,000 of your HP and in return, immunizes you against Silence for 10 seconds.

name: elf_tear_darkness
description: The first-class pharmacist Vincent has created this potion. Endows superhuman strength, though it's only temporary.
effects: Instantly consumes 3,000 of your HP and in return, immunizes you against Blind for 10 seconds.

name: cure_free_throw
description: Slightly remodeled Cure Free enabled for throwing. Recovers several kinds of abnormal statuses. Recovers a small amount of HP.(Cures: Silence, Bleeding, Poison, Curse, Reverse Orcish, Change Undead)

name: hp_increase_potion_small_throw
description: Slightly remodeled HP increase potion(S) enabled for throwing. MaxHP slightly increased for 500 sec, HP recovery +1%.

name: hp_increase_potion_mid_throw
description: Slightly remodeled HP increase potion(M) enabled for throwing. MaxHP moderately increased for 500 sec, HP recovery +2%.

name: hp_increase_potion_large_throw
description: Slightly remodeled HP increase potion(L) enabled for throwing. MaxHP greatly increased for 500 sec, HP recovery +5%.

name: hp_increase_potion_small_throw
description: Slightly remodeled SP Increase Potion(S) enabled for throwing. MaxSP slightly increased for 500 sec, SP recovery +2%.

name: sp_increase_potion_mid_throw
description: Slightly remodeled SP Increase Potion(M) enabled for throwing. MaxSP increased for 500 sec, SP recovery +4%.

name: sp_increase_potion_large_throw
description: Slightly remodeled SP increase potion(L) enabled for throwing. MaxSP greatly increased for 500 sec, SP recovery +8%.

name: enriched_white_potion_z_throw
description: Slightly remodeled Enriched White Potion enabled for throwing. Recovers a large amount of HP, increases natural HP recovery speed by 20%. Duration : 500 sec.

name: vitata50_throw
description: Slightly remodeled Vitata 500 enabled for throwing. Recovers SP, and increase SP recovery speed by 20%, increase MaxSP by 5%. Duration : 500 sec.

name: start_your_journey_pack
description: The Start your Journey Pack contains several items that will allow you move around Rune Midgard kingdom's cities so you can complete your job change quest quickly, get more exp for 30 minutes, and keep yourself heal during early adventure battles. Also 20 Red Envelopes are given to help you get that last little bit of experience needed for that next level. Contains:20 Red Envelopes200 Novice Red Potions1 Battle Manual3 Rune Midgard Butterfly Wings

name: small_life_potion_10_box
description: A box that contains 10 Small Life Potions.
effects: Gives Small Life Potion x10.

name: medium_life_potion_10_box
description: A box that contains 10 Medium Life Potions.
effects: Gives Medium Life Potion x10.

name: regeneration_potion_5_box
description: A box that contains 5 Regeneration Potions.
effects: Gives Regeneration Potion x5.

name: small_defense_potion_10_box
description: A box that contains 10 Small Defense Potions.
effects: Gives Small Defense Potion x10.

name: big_defense_potion_10_box
description: A box that contains 10 Big Defense Potions.
effects: Gives Big Defense Potion x10.

name: small_magic_defense_potion_10_box
description: A box that contains 10 Small Magic Defense Potions.
effects: Gives Small Magic Defense Potion x10.

name: big_magic_defense_potion_10_box
description: A box that contains 10 Big Magic Defense Potions.
effects: Gives Big Magic Defense Potion x10.

name: light_blue_potion_box
description: A box that contains 25 Light Blue Potions.

name: advanced_wo_e_supply_box
description: A supply box containing WoE potions.

combo: WoE White Potion x50WoE Blue Potion x20

name: regeneration_potion
description: A magic potion made with alchemy and magic.  A Rosary is rumored to be one of the secret ingredients in making this potion.
effects: Increases the recovery rate of skills and items by 20% for 30 minutes.

name: small_defense_potion
description: A secret potion made using tough dragon scales.
effects: Reduces damage received from all melee attacks by 3% for 1 minute.

name: big_defense_potion
description: A secret potion made using tough dragon scales.
effects: Reduces damage received from all melee attacks by 3% for 3 minutes.

name: small_magic_defense_potion
description: A secret potion made using pixie mustache.
effects: Reduces damage received from all magic attacks by 3% for 1 minute.

name: big_magic_defense_potion
description: A secret potion made using pixie mustache.
effects: Reduces damage received from all magic attacks by 3% for 3 minutes.

name: squid_bbq
description: Aromatic and salty roasted squid. Can feel the Chef's passion and devotion in it. Recovers little HP and SP.EXP from Fish type monster increases by 25%.

name: single_cookie
description: A cookie which I will eat alone in Christmas. I'm not lonely. I'm not lonely. Recover 5% of HP and SP.

name: mad_bunny_scroll
description: When opened gives the user one of the following: [Mad Bunny Special] [0][Safe to 7 Armor Certificate][Safe to 7 Headgear Certificate][Safe to 7 Weapon Certificate][Safe to 10 Certificate][STR Soul Potion][AGI Soul Potion][VIT Soul Potion][INT Soul Potion][DEX Soul Potion][LUK Soul Potion][Blacksmith's Blessing]

name: granpa_speed_potion
description: A potion created and distributed by 13th anniversary NPC Granpa Boxter. No matter who you race with, you will pass everyone
effects: Greatly increases the user's movement speed for X seconds.
